title: Open In Inventory
description: Open guidebooks, backpacks, handhelds and more with a single click in inventory
body:
# Open In Inventory

Open guidebooks, backpacks, handhelds and more with a single click in inventory.

Before:

1. Locate the item
2. Transfer item to hotbar
3. Close GUI
4. Scroll you mouse wheel to select the item, and finally
5. Open it.

After:

0. (configurable) Ensure your main hand is empty
1. Locate the item, and
2. Right click it to open.

To make it even more convinent, Open In Inventory will automatically swap the stack back to the original position once you exit its GUI.

## Features

- Easy to use: just right click
- Tooltip indication for supported item
- Builtin support for Patchouli books, AE2, and Refined Storage
- Support for both Right Click and Shift + Right Click
- Add your favourite interactable item to support list via configuration
- Integration with KubeJS and CraftTweaker
- Builtin safety measure that can automatically skip clicking handling when expected action is impossible or might cause issue
- Localizable config comments to help user understand config more easily
